owns: what does it sound like / how does it mix (MIR analysis, embeddings, cues, crates, transitions, similarity, rendering)

analysis.similarity: pgvector ANN via tools/similarity/sonic_discovery.py (DECISIONS_LOCKED §8). Voyager/Annoy benched but NOT adopted.
analysis.deferred: Klio / Apache Beam (overkill for ~18k local FLACs; use local multiprocessing)

writes_to_slut_via: SQL / payloads file handed to slut; slut applies. NO direct writes to music_v4.db.
join_keys_note: ISRC is a nullable tertiary key (~25.2k/31.4k coverage), not the primary join. Corrects earlier spine event #4.
notes: Snapshot only. Durable history is handoffs/handoff.jsonl; locked decisions are DECISIONS_LOCKED (see README migration note).
